The '''Mon Calamari heavy carrier''' was a [[Warship/Legends|warship]] developed by the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] for use by the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]].

==History==
One warship of the class, ''[[Blue Diver]]'', was attached to the [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Second Fleet]]. It was part of a [[Task force/Legends|task force]] of Second Fleet warships dispatched to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] during a growing crisis between the Alliance and the Corellian government.

It carried several fighter squadrons and was equipped with turbolasers and ion cannons.

==Behind the scenes==
The Mon Calamari heavy carrier was the first vessel in the ''[[Star Wars Legends]]'' designed by the Mon Calamari to be described as a carrier.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]''
